# PantryPal Vision

PantryPal is a family-first kitchen and grocery assistant built for real households.

It should help families:

- Know what food they already own.
- Reduce food waste.
- Save money on groceries.
- Plan meals using pantry items.
- Track staple inventory.
- Find the best grocery deals.
- Build smarter shopping lists.
- Scan receipts and food.
- Eventually automate grocery planning.

Design goals:

- Extremely simple to use.
- Mobile-first.
- Large buttons.
- Fast.
- Family friendly.
- Rustic Rush City / Minnesota log cabin theme.
- Mild recipes by default.
- Practical instead of flashy.

Every feature should save the family either:

- time,
- money,
- food,
- or frustration.

If a feature doesn't accomplish one of those goals, it probably shouldn't be added.
